channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ELIL] Logica Infoway Approves Audited Results for FY26
item.description:
Logica Infoway Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone financial results for the half year and financial year ended March 31, 2026, along with an unmodified Auditor's Report. The board meeting, held on May 12, 2026, also approved the declaration of unmodified opinion on audited financial results, statement of deviation and variation in utilization of funds, compliance certificate, integrated filing, appointment of internal auditors, and related party transactions. The trading window remains closed until 48 hours after the declaration of results.

  • Audited standalone financial results for FY26 approved with unmodified opinion.
  • Punit Pandey & Associates appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Statement of Deviation and Variation in utilization of funds approved.
  • Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Eastern Logica Infoway Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [HPAL] HP Adhesives Recommends ₹0.40 Dividend for FY 2025-26
item.description:
HP Adhesives Ltd's Board of Directors, in a meeting held on May 12, 2026, recommended a final dividend of ₹ 0.40 (20%) per fully paid-up equity share of ₹ 2 each for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting and will be paid within 30 days of declaration. The board also approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the same period. The trading window will open on May 15, 2026.

  • HP Adhesives recommends a final dividend of ₹ 0.40 per share.
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Audited financial results for FY 2025-26 were approved.
  • Trading window opens on May 15, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HP Adhesives Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [NRAGRINDQ] NR Agarwal Alters MOA for Property Development
item.description:
NR Agarwal Industries Ltd's Board approved alterations to its Memorandum of Association (MOA) on May 12, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. The changes include renumbering an existing clause and inserting a new clause to enable the company to develop its land and immovable properties for industrial and commercial purposes. This includes constructing industrial units, warehouses, and commercial complexes, and dealing with third parties. The alteration aims to facilitate commercial development and requires shareholder approval and filing with the Registrar of Companies.

  • NR Agarwal's board approved MOA alteration for property development.
  • New clause allows development of industrial and commercial complexes.
  • Shareholder approval is required for the MOA changes.
  • Alteration aims to commercially utilize company's land assets.
  • The company can raise finance for development purposes.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: N.R.AGARWAL INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [KROSS] Kross Ltd Approves Audited Results for FY26
item.description:
Kross Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. They also appointed M/s. Sohan Lal Jalan and Associate as Cost Auditor and GWC Professional Services Private Limited as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27. The board meeting commenced at 04:30 p.m. and concluded at 07:10 p.m.

  • Audited standalone financial results for FY26 approved.
  • S. K. Naredi & Co LLP issued an unmodified audit opinion.
  • Sohan Lal Jalan and Associate appointed as Cost Auditor for FY27.
  • GWC Professional Services Private Limited appointed as Internal Auditor for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kross Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [VIDYAWIRES] Vidya Wires: No Deviation in IPO Proceeds Utilization
item.description:
Vidya Wires Ltd confirms no deviation or variation in the utilization of proceeds from its Initial Public Offer (IPO) for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, as per Regulation 32 of SEBI guidelines. The IPO, which raised ₹2740.00 Million on December 08, 2025, was intended for objects stated in the Prospectus dated 6th December, 2025. The audit committee reviewed the statement, and auditors provided no comments.

  • Vidya Wires reports no deviation in IPO proceeds for Q1 2026.
  • IPO raised ₹2740.00 Million on December 08, 2025.
  • Proceeds utilized as per Prospectus dated December 6, 2025.
  • Audit Committee reviewed the statement with no comments.
  • Brickwork Ratings India Private Limited is the monitoring agency.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vidya Wires Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [GANDHAR] Gandhar Oil: Deena Mehta Resigns as Director, Eff. May 12, 2026
item.description:
Gandhar Oil Refinery (India) Ltd announced the resignation of Mrs. Deena Mehta as Non-Executive Independent Director, effective May 12, 2026, due to pre-occupation. The company has confirmed that there are no other material reasons for her resignation besides those mentioned in her resignation letter. Consequently, she will also cease to be a member of the Audit Committee, Nomination and Remuneration Committee, and Risk Management Committee. The resignation letter and detailed reasons are enclosed as Annexure – II.

  • Deena Mehta resigned as Non-Executive Independent Director of Gandhar Oil, effective May 12, 2026.
  • Resignation is due to pre-occupation with other business activities.
  • Mehta confirmed no other material reasons for resignation beyond those stated.
  • She will also cease to be a member of key committees.
  • Mehta holds directorships in Asit C. Mehta, Fino Payments Bank, and Anand Rathi Wealth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gandhar Oil Refinery (India) Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [FABCLEAN] Fabtech Bags ₹70.82 Cr Orders in April, Order Book at ₹229.25 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd. announced it secured consolidated orders worth ₹70.82 crore in April 2026, primarily driven by the Pharma sector (₹40.01 crore) and Renewable Energy (₹29.25 crore). As of April 30, 2026, the company's consolidated order book stands at ₹229.25 crore. The company is also actively considering orders totaling ₹407.16 crore, with significant opportunities in Renewable Energy and Pharma. Key orders include a ₹31 crore order for Cleanroom Partitions and a ₹29.25 crore Letter of Intent (LOI) for HVAC systems.

  • Fabtech secured ₹70.82 crore in new orders during April 2026.
  • The consolidated order book stands at ₹229.25 crore as of April 30, 2026.
  • Orders under active consideration total ₹407.16 crore.
  • Major orders secured from healthcare and renewable energy sectors.
  • Pharma and Renewable Energy sectors are key growth drivers.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fabtech Technologies Cleanrooms Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [INOXINDIA] INOX India: Final Dividend of ₹2/Share; Record Date June 9, 2026
item.description:
The Board of Directors of INOX India Ltd. approved a final dividend of ₹2 per equity share (100%) for the financial year 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The record date for determining shareholders' eligibility for the dividend is set as Tuesday, June 09, 2026. The decision was made during the board meeting held on May 12, 2026, where the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, were also approved.

  • INOX India declares a final dividend of ₹2 per share (100%) for FY26.
  • Record date for dividend eligibility is fixed as June 09, 2026.
  • Dividend payout is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 were approved at the board meeting.
  • Auditors SRBC & Co. LLP issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INOX India Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [CMPDI] CMPDI: Senior Management Changes on 12th May, 2026
item.description:
Central Mine Planning & Design Institute Ltd (CMPDI) announced changes in senior management personnel on May 12, 2026. Manoj Upadhyaya assumed the role of Head of Department (Materials Management), while H R Sonapuram handed over the charge. Ghanshyam S Gahlot took charge as Regional Director (RD), RI-II, Dhanbad, succeeding Uma Shankar Singh.

  • Manoj Upadhyaya appointed as Head of Department (Materials Management) on May 12, 2026.
  • H R Sonapuram relinquished charge of HoD (MM) to Manoj Upadhyaya.
  • Ghanshyam S Gahlot assumed charge as Regional Director (RD), RI-II, Dhanbad on May 12, 2026.
  • Uma Shankar Singh handed over charge of Regional Director(RD), RI-II, Dhanbad to Ghanshyam S Gahlot.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Central Mine Planning & Design Institute Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [INDRENEW] IND Renewable Energy Approves Unaudited Financial Results
item.description:
IND Renewable Energy Ltd's Board of Directors approved the Unaudited Financial Results for the Quarter ended December 31, 2025, during its meeting held on May 12, 2026. The meeting commenced at 06:00 PM and concluded at 07:15 PM. The company's Unaudited Standalone Financial Results for the Quarter ended December 31, 2025, and the Limited Review Report were enclosed. Revenue from operations remained at ₹0.000 Lakhs for the quarter ended December 31, 2025.

  • Board approved Unaudited Financial Results for Quarter ended December 31, 2025.
  • Meeting commenced at 06:00 PM and concluded at 07:15 PM on May 12, 2026.
  • Revenue from Operations reported as ₹0.000 Lakhs for the quarter.
  • Loss before tax is ₹(0.280) Lakhs.
  • Total Comprehensive Income for the period is ₹(0.500) Lakhs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IND Renewable Energy Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
